CPRED_BF.module.title: Your New Best Friend
CPRED_BF.abilities.flamebreath.desc: The Neon Newt blows an impressive blast of fire. Acts like a Flamethrower. Cannot be used two turns in a row.
CPRED_BF.abilities.acidSecretion.desc: The Neon Newt secretes intense acid through its skin, lowering the SP of all worn armor by 1.
CPRED_BF.abilities.venomFangs.desc: Target must beat DV13 Resist Torture/Drugs Check or take 1d6 additional damage directly to HP.
CPRED_BF.abilities.airhypoVampyres.desc: Pumps a dose of a loaded substance into the target. Compartment holds up to 5 doses.
CPRED_BF.abilities.protection.desc: The Forever Turtle draws into its shell. Hardened Shell extends to head. Cannot be targeted by Aimed Shots.
CPRED_BF.abilities.combatAwareness.desc: Functions as the Combat Awareness Role Ability.
CPRED_BF.abilities.recovery.desc: When knocked prone, the Cyberbear can attempt DV13 Martial Arts to Get Up as a free action.
CPRED_BF.abilities.threeArmStrike.desc: After hitting with two Bear Claw attacks, attempt DV15 Martial Arts for a devastating follow-up.
CPRED_BF.abilities.traumaNanomatrix.desc: Once per day, as an Action, repair Skinweave or Subdermal Armor to full SP.
CPRED_BF.chat.cooldownActive: Flamebreath was used last turn and cannot be activated again yet.
CPRED_BF.chat.noDoses: No doses remaining! Reload the Airhypo.
CPRED_BF.chat.alreadyUsedToday: Trauma Response Nanomatrix has already been used today.
CPRED_BF.chat.protectionOn: Protection activated! Shell covers head. Cannot be targeted by Aimed Shots.
CPRED_BF.chat.protectionOff: Protection deactivated. The turtle emerges from its shell.
CPRED_BF.chat.combatAwarenessInactive: No allied Cyberwolf within 20m. Combat Awareness inactive.
CPRED_BF.chat.threeArmStrike.fail: Failed! Brain tumor causes 5 damage to the Cyberbear.
